name: Aparna Nancherla
bio: Aparna Nancherla is an American comedian, writer, and voice actress whose dry, anxious, introspective stand-up draws on her experiences with depression and social anxiety. She has written for Totally Biased and Late Night with Seth Meyers, recorded a Comedy Central Half Hour, and voiced Hollyhock on BoJack Horseman. Her quiet, deadpan delivery is a staple of the alternative comedy circuit.

timeline.ev: Records a Comedy Central Half Hour
Releases her first full special, Hopeful Potato

accolades: Writer for Totally Biased and Late Night with Seth Meyers
Recurring voice role as Hollyhock on BoJack Horseman

bits.t: What It is Like to Live with Anxiety and Depression

bits.yt_title: What It’s Like to Live with Anxiety and Depression - Aparna Nancherla
